Chumba Casino is an online social casino that offers a variety of games such as slots, blackjack, and video poker. It operates on a sweepstakes model, where players can purchase virtual currency called "Gold Coins" to play games, but they also receive "Sweeps Coins" as a bonus with their purchases. Sweeps Coins can be used to play games as well, and players can redeem them for cash prizes. Chumba Casino is known for its accessibility and social gaming experience, and it is legal to play in the United States, except for Washington state. - https://dswdassistance.com/chumba-card/
